items.snippet: Main Street's preliminary Q4 2021 results show continued strong performance; company also announces federal tax treatment of 2021 dividends.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Main Street originates $459M in Q4 2021 private loan commitments, funds $369M
items.snippet: Main Street originated approximately $459.1M in new commitments across 17 new borrowers and funded $369.1M in investments during Q4 2021.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Main Street Q3 2021 DNII $0.76/share, NAV rises to $24.27
items.snippet: Main Street Q3 2021 NII of $0.71/share, DNII $0.76/share, NAV $24.27/share; total investment income $76.8M.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Main Street raises Q1 2022 monthly dividend 2.4% to $0.215, declares $0.10 supplemental
items.snippet: Main Street declares $0.215/share monthly dividends for Q1 2022, a 2.4% increase, plus a $0.10 supplemental dividend payable in December 2021.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Main Street originates $99M in Q3 2021 private loan commitments, funds $120M
items.snippet: Main Street originated approximately $99.3M in new private loan commitments across six new borrowers and funded $119.7M in investments during Q3 2021.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Main Street Q2 2021 DNII $0.66/share, NAV rises to $23.42
items.snippet: Main Street Q2 2021 NII of $0.62/share, DNII $0.66/share, NAV $23.42/share; total investment income $67.3M.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Main Street raises Q4 2021 monthly dividend 2.4% to $0.21
items.snippet: Main Street declares $0.21/share monthly dividends for Q4 2021, representing a 2.4% increase compared to Q3 2021.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Main Street originates $119M in Q2 2021 private loan commitments, funds $126M
items.snippet: Main Street originated approximately $118.5M in new private loan commitments across six new borrowers and funded $125.6M in investments during Q2 2021.
